name: xdm_queue_completion_overlay
description: Adds multiple persisted queue schedules, missed-run policies, per-download priority, antivirus scanning, platform capability checks, and cancellable queue-completion actions.
commitMessage: Add queue completion actions and multiple schedules
constraints: Do not restore or build WPF, GTK, WinForms or MSIX targets
Launch completion commands and antivirus scanners directly without a shell
Require absolute existing executable paths for configurable commands
Expose destructive actions only after capability checks and a cancellable countdown
